1699950.name: Legends of Celestite RPG: The All Bearer
1699950.description:
:VERSION 1.0:

Mana shall shatter and be reborn as drums pound to the rhythm of roses!

A crimson darkness envelops the radiant moon above Azmoria, carving an indelible tale into the celestite archives. Fate intertwines two factions, setting the stage for an epic showdown of power. A new saga of heroes must unite to confront their intertwined pasts and a tumultuous present, as an unstoppable supervillain rises from the dead, intent on claiming dominion over all celestites/yokai souls. This is the first part of a two-part, story-driven RPG series based on a draft novel written by Raven Burns (Mr. Crumb).

Legends of Celestite Part 1: The All Bearer weaves emotional, manga-style storytelling with classic JRPG adventure, set in a meticulously crafted, lore-rich, action-packed world inspired by late 80s and 90s anime culture.

FEATURES:

TURN-BASED ELEMENTAL COMBAT! - Legends of Celestite RPG combines intense battles with a rich, dark-fantasy, "shonen-like" storyline. Each ally who joins the player can fill several roles in combat, such as Tank, DPS, Debuffer, Healer, or Supporter, or do whatever you want to do with them. The battle system also features element-based damage tactics that must be overcome by enhancing yourself with abilities. There are also special aura buffs, adding strategic depth when forming your favourite teams of three. There are a total of nine playable characters throughout part one.

ANIMATED ATB BATTLE SYSTEM!- Experience dynamic, animated battle sprites in a fast and fluid ATB combat system. String together combo additions, charge your Cross-Skill Meter, and unleash powerful abilities. With no random encounters, battles appear in the world and can be avoided with ease.

Collectibles and Secrets await you in Azmoria. Discover Abacus Tokens that help unlock the rarest items/weapons/armours and chests within the game!

POWER & CONTROL! - Unlock abilities with CP (Celestite Points) and learn/empower your abilities the way you want to.

Adventurer's notes: I strongly recommend playing the game in Window Mode. You can do this by pressing F3 on your keyboard to minimize the screen. You can still use Full-Screen while doing this. The game comes with character cards, concept art, wallpapers and more for personal non-commercial use.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
